record.field: List classes/sessions for a given date
What classes are on today? List all classes for Friday Show me Monday's classes What sessions do we have this week?
What's the schedule today? Show today's classes What classes are happening now? What's on the schedule? What do we have today?
Get attendance history for a member
Show John's attendance history How often has Sarah been coming in? When did Test8 last attend? Show me Mike's recent classes What's Jane's attendance like?
Check in a member for attendance
Check in John Mark Sarah as present Test8 just arrived Sign in Mike for class Check in Jane Doe
Check out a member from attendance
Check out John Mark Sarah as done for today Test8 is leaving Sign out Mike Jane is heading home
Manually create an attendance log entry
Log attendance for John at 5pm Create an attendance entry for Sarah Record Test8's check-in at 3:30pm
